TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kahaehaeoan, title = Kahaehaeoan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kahaehaeoan} }

S.FORM: Kahaehaeoan Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Kahaehaeoan a niyaro', 27 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 60 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 54 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Saysiyat 73%, Tayal 15%, Amis 2%.
S.PHON: kańßa…ôńßa…ôo~uan itiniaj i wo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u kańßa…ôńßa…ôo~uan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u sajsijat **%, taja…ĺ **%, amis *%.
S.FORM: Kahaehaeoan Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Kahaehaeoan a niyaro', 27 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 60 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 54 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Saysiyat 73%, Tayal 15%, Amis 2%.
S.PHON: kańßa…ôńßa…ôo~uan itiniaj i wo~u~uf…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßsin ¶ńßo~u~u ko~u kańßa…ôńßa…ôo~uan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u sajsijat **%, taja…ĺ **%, amis *%.
